query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: Several cows stand and rest in an open grassy field bordered by scattered deciduous trees along the distant horizon, beneath an expansive sky that occupies the upper majority of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Rendered in a faded, desaturated monotone palette with crushed midtones and weak tonal separation that produces a heavy atmosphere, several cows stand and rest in an open grassy field bordered by scattered deciduous trees along the distant horizon, beneath an expansive sky that fills the upper majority of the frame.
